form.formComment: Resumes off a 31 day letup. Last outing finished fifth of 8 starters at Kempton Park on March 14 over 4800m, 50 len behind Doctor Ken carrying 74kg at $12. The start before that; pulled up at Ascot on February 14 over 3900m. Big task ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Resumes off a 31 day letup. Last outing finished fifth of 8 starters at Kempton Park on March 14 over 4800m, 50 len behind Doctor Ken carrying 74kg at $12. The start before that; pulled up at Ascot on February 14 over 3900m. Big task ahead.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Last run finished fifth of 10 runners at Wetherby on March 17 over 4800m, 7 len behind Imperial Merlin carrying 68.5kg at $6.50. Before that finished second of 9 starters at Doncaster on February 27 over 4800m, 4.5 len behind If Not For Dylan with 71kg at $6.50. Right in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Useful gelding. Last run finished fifth of 10 runners at Wetherby on March 17 over 4800m, 7 len behind Imperial Merlin carrying 68.5kg at $6.50. Before that finished second of 9 starters at Doncaster on February 27 over 4800m, 4.5 len behind If Not For Dylan with 71kg at $6.50. Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Freshened for 37 days. Fresh up after three months fell at Carlisle on March 8 over 4900m. Previously second-up finished sixth of 9 starters at this track on December 26 over 5500m, 26 len behind Red Delta carrying 74kg at $12. Should be tough to beat this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Second-up today. Freshened for 37 days. Fresh up after three months fell at Carlisle on March 8 over 4900m. Previously second-up finished sixth of 9 starters at this track on December 26 over 5500m, 26 len behind Red Delta carrying 74kg at $12. Should be tough to beat this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth of 7 runners at Hereford on March 18 over 5100m, 13 len behind Don Rafael carrying 73kg at $11. Race before ran on from midfield; finished seventh of 10 starters at Newcastle on February 21 over 6700m, 61 len behind Anglers Crag with 63kg at $23. Won't find this easy.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Last start finished fourth of 7 runners at Hereford on March 18 over 5100m, 13 len behind Don Rafael carrying 73kg at $11. Race before ran on from midfield; finished seventh of 10 starters at Newcastle on February 21 over 6700m, 61 len behind Anglers Crag with 63kg at $23. Won't find this easy.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last run finished fourth of 7 starters at Wetherby on March 17 over 3880m, 7 len behind Rath Gaul Hill with 74.5kg at $15. At only start last preparation tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a neck Fakenham on December 21 over 4200m slow track defeating Shantou Lucky with 69.5kg at $7 in a steeplechase. Improvement in store.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Racing second-up today. Last run finished fourth of 7 starters at Wetherby on March 17 over 3880m, 7 len behind Rath Gaul Hill with 74.5kg at $15. At only start last preparation tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a neck Fakenham on December 21 over 4200m slow track defeating Shantou Lucky with 69.5kg at $7 in a steeplechase. Improvement in store.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after two months won by 2.75 len Wetherby on March 27 over 4800m defeating Slaney Opera carrying 75kg at $13 in a steeplechase. Previously second-up pulled up at this track on January 16 over 4800m. Can continue the bright start to the campaign.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Second-up today. Fresh up after two months won by 2.75 len Wetherby on March 27 over 4800m defeating Slaney Opera carrying 75kg at $13 in a steeplechase. Previously second-up pulled up at this track on January 16 over 4800m. Can continue the bright start to the campaign.
